title: The Letter of Muhammad al-Amin to His Brother $alih
description: $alih2s In the name of God, the Merciful, the Compassionate: If this letter of mine reaches you at the occurrence of what God has foreknown-His Decree that He has executed in regard to His viceroys29 and His friends, and His established ordinance in regard to the prophets, the apostles, and the angels stationed near Him (so that He has said, "All things perish, except His Face; His is the Judgment, and unto Him you shall be returned"30)praise ye God for that to which the…

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 31
